sections.title: Blockers & Risks
sections.query: project = {prefix} AND status = Blocked AND sprint in openSprints()

powers.label: Unblock Plan
powers.prompt: Create an unblock plan for {key} "{summary}". Identify dependencies and suggest resolution steps.

powers.label: Escalation
powers.prompt: Draft an escalation email for blocked ticket {key} "{summary}". Include impact, urgency, and ask.

powers.label: Sprint Report
powers.prompt: Generate a sprint health report for {prefix} current sprint. Include progress, risks, blockers, and velocity.

powers.label: Standup
powers.prompt: Generate today's standup summary based on {prefix} sprint activity. Include done, in progress, and blockers.

sections.title: Stale Items (>5 days)
sections.query: project = {prefix} AND sprint in openSprints() AND status != Done AND updated <= -5d

powers.label: Follow Up
powers.prompt: Draft a follow-up message for stale ticket {key} "{summary}" that hasn't been updated in over 5 days.
